name: Danny Diaz
subject: The Democrats are lying already!
body:
Friend,

**She 's worried.**

This past week, Hillary and her campaign team have been deliberately misleading voters about Governor Bush because they know he's the best chance we have to defeat her.

And now we find out that Hillary will single Jeb out in a speech saying his goals for the economy are too optimistic. Well we don't agree with Hillary's defeatist view of the American people and we need to push back.

[**That 's why we're launching our Hillary Rapid Response Fund and we need 5,000 supporters to give $25, $10, or $5 right now.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/wwlqkwjmzsgbfhfdbwyqzbthjjbtmhkmqwnwgmhzwvf_tcmvvjpw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

**Hillary and National Democrats don 't have a record to run on so they have to resort to misleading attacks to try to win. We can't let them get away with this. We have to fight back.**

[**Friend , he needs you right now. Can you chip in $25, $10, or even $5 to our Hillary Rapid Response Fund immediately to help us push back?**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/scvfwcphlkmtjgjbtcdfltzgpptzhgwhfcscmhglcvb_tcmvvjpw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

This is going to be a long campaign, and I know Jeb has the record and vision to win, but we can't win if we let these attacks go unanswered.**[So please chip in what you can right now to our Hillary Rapid Response Fund.](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/bjjkvjzmbqgydndpyjtkbysnzzysmnvmkjcjgmnbjfl_tcmvvjpw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

Thank you, Friend. The Democrats won't be able to campaign this cycle on misleading attacks because of you.

Danny

Danny Diaz
Campaign Manager
Jeb 2016, Inc.

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/okwgskqnmlwdfpftdkvgmdcpqqdcnpsngkrkwnpmkjj_tcmvvjpw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=1300&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Friend, Can we talk?
body:
LindseyGraham.com

Friend,

ISIS attacks. Iran's nuclear program. Israel's safety.
International hackers. Greece's economy. I could go on.

The list of critical threats our country faces is constantly
growing.

I am the only candidate for president who has a clear and
comprehensive plan to protect our nation. But in order to become
our next Commander-in-Chief and put that plan into action, I need
your immediate help.

Can I count on you for a critical campaign contribution of $100
or more right now?

After you donate $100, you will be directed to the details for a
Supporter-Only conference call this Wednesday, July 15th at
4:30pm EST.

You see, Friend, I wish that we had an opportunity to talk more
frequently, which is why our campaign has set up this
Supporter-Only call.

I know summer is a busy time for everyone, but I hope we can
catch up on Wednesday to discuss important topics like national
security and give you an opportunity to ask me questions about my
presidential campaign.

Even though I wish we could meet in person, this format will
allow supporters to call in from all over the country and will
help our campaign raise the funds we need to spread my message of
"Security Through Strength" to voters everywhere.

Thank you for your support. I hope to talk with you on Wednesday.

Sincerely,

P.S. I hate asking for money; it is by far the biggest downside
of running a campaign. But, as you know, we wouldn't be able to
run a winning campaign without the funds needed to fuel it.
After your donation of $100 or more, you will be directed to the
details for the call. If you know of friends who might want to
contribute and participate in our Supporter-Only conference call,
please forward this email to them. Thank you.

Paid for by Lindsey
Graham 2016

You were added to the system April 14, 2015.

George Pataki

name: Terry Sullivan, MarcoRubio.com
subject: They missed the point
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Peter,
Earlier today Marco shared with you the news
that our campaign has raised over $12 million, exceeding our goal
for the first major fundraising deadline of the campaign.
It's great news and we are thankful for our
supporters who helped us get there, but I've seen some press
reports that missed the real point. What they've chosen to
highlight is NOT the only reason you should donate to the
campaign.
Check this out from the Wall Street Journal:
"The early numbers suggest the Rubio camp is
following through on its pledge to run a thrifty operation. His
official campaign spent $2.27 million since mid-April, when Mr.
Rubio officially declared his bid, spending less than 19% of what
it took in.
"By comparison, the last two GOP nominees -
Arizona Sen. John McCain and former Massachusetts Gov. Mitt
Romney - spent 67% and 30%, respectively, of what they brought in
during their first quarter of operation. Most campaigns tend to
spend between 30%-50% of what they raise.
"Rubio advisers are trying to run a tight
campaign that is able to stretch dollars more than its rivals.
The campaign, for example, reserved airtime in the early primary
states earlier than its rivals to secure cheaper advertising
rates."
This campaign isn't just about fundraising or
about what we raise or what we spend. This campaign is about
Marco's message, leadership and vision for our country. The money
we raise enables us to ensure voters hear Marco's message, learn
about his leadership, and work towards our shared vision.
Our pledge to supporters is this: We will
continue to ensure that your donations are spent wisely and with
the most impact possible for getting Marco the most votes we can.
Will you help us continue to grow and build
our campaign by clicking here and donating $7 right now?
Thank you for your support.
Sincerely,
Terry Sullivan
Campaign Manager
Marco Rubio for President

Paid for by Marco Rubio for President

name: Jeff Weaver, Bernie 2016
subject: The first step for electing Bernie
body:
#
Friend -
Bernie's presidential campaign is being called the most serious threat to establishment politics and economics in a generation -- and all it took were a few big events and 400,000 individual contributions.
They ain't seen nothing yet.
As important as they are, crowds and donations are not enough to take this country back from the billionaire class. What's it going to take? Organizing.
**That 's why I'm inviting you to host an Organizing Kickoff meeting on the evening of Wednesday, July 29th. [Click here to create your event. It'll only take a minute.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb206a/43f17890/5c709adf/621d819d/1456060774/VEsF/ "https://secure.berniesanders.com/page/event/create?source=em150713july29-d")**
Bernie will speak live to all the events, we'll discuss the issues that this campaign is all about, and then together we'll take one more step to create a grassroots movement that will change everything: forming and joining volunteer teams.
Many teams and local groups are already hard at work. This will be a chance for them to reach out to new members, and for new groups to form as well.
[**Click here to take the first step to setting up your July 29 Organizing Meeting now.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb206a/43f17890/5c709adf/621d819d/1456060774/VEsC/ "https://secure.berniesanders.com/page/event/create?source=em150713july29-d")
Here's more information about the Organizing Kickoff:
**Organizing Meetings: Wednesday, July 29, 7 p.m. ET & PT**
Hosting an organizing meeting means opening up your home or finding another space for Bernie supporters to come together for a program from our campaign.
The meeting will include two parts. One part will be for Bernie supporters to meet each other and share their stories about why they support Bernie. The other part will be a live online broadcast featuring Bernie and campaign staff discussing concrete steps we can all take together to build our movement.
**Your Goal: Empowering Other Bernie Supporters to Work for Bernie**
A successful organizing meeting means creating the space for Bernie supporters -- whether they're your friends, neighbors, or just people from your area -- to participate in the national organizing meeting program.
Your goal will be to facilitate Bernie supporters meeting each other and sharing their stories, and then making sure people can watch and listen to Bernie's message about what we're doing next. By the end of the night, people at your meeting will have had the chance to take the next step to help elect Bernie Sanders as our next president. Our goal is to have supporters form and join neighborhood teams to organize our communities for Bernie.
[**Sound good to you? If so, take the first step to setting up your July 29 Organizing Meeting now.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb206a/43f17890/5c709adf/621d819d/1456060774/VEsD/ "https://secure.berniesanders.com/page/event/create?source=em150713july29-d")
Here's what else to expect from the meetings:
**How We'll Help You**
We're going to provide you with instructions, tips, materials, and people who can walk you through questions in the lead up to our organizing meetings. We'll have several online trainings before the big night, and you'll have the chance to hear what other meeting hosts are doing for their events.
You won't be on your own. In fact, you'll be part of a big network of other meeting hosts who are helping us build something special: a grassroots network of volunteers to make Bernie our next president.
**Why Organizing Meetings Matter**
Bernie's told you this before, but it bears repeating: we're up against a billionaire class intent on buying our democracy. And while our supporters have been incredible in helping us raise our own funds, we need to rely on something bigger, something stronger: a campaign built by a grassroots army.
These meetings are the first step to creating an organization that will be able to stand against the best that our opponents' money can buy. By hosting an organizing meeting on July 29, you'd be taking a huge step to creating this organization.
**We're in this together. July 29 is going to be an historic night, and we'd be so excited if you could join us in hosting an organizing meeting.**
[**Take the first step and set up your July 29 organizing meeting for Bernie.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb206a/43f17890/5c709adf/621d819d/1456060774/VEsA/ "https://secure.berniesanders.com/page/event/create?source=em150713july29-d")
If you're not interested in hosting, don't worry: we'll be in touch very soon about how to attend other organizing meetings happening in your area.
I can't wait to see what we can build together.
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager, Bernie 2016

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb206a/43f17890/5c709adf/621d819a/1456060774/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=emb150713july29-d")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb206a/43f17890/5c709adf/621d819b/1456060774/VEsO/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb206a/43f17890/5c709adf/621d8198/1456060774/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb206a/43f17890/5c709adf/621d8199/1456060774/VEsHBQ/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb206a/43f17890/5c709adf/621d8186/1456060774/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Team Murphy
subject: Are you on Team Murphy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Patrick needs your endorsement. Friend -- As of last week, 50 elected officials and over 2,000 of you have endorsed Patrick for U.S. Senate. But we're still waiting to hear from you. **[Click here to join Team Murphy and endorse Patrick today!](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae206b/738133e4/39042d6c/7f91399e/2607838748/VEsH/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/endorse?sc=ema_2015-07-13_b1_tm")** -Team Murphy \-- begin forwarded message -- From: Team Murphy
Date: Friday, July 10, 2015
Subject: Who do you endorse? Friend -- Cory Booker is in. So are Lois Frankel and Charlie Crist. Will you join them? [**We need you to step up and endorse Patrick for U.S. Senate. Will you add your name as an endorser today?**](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae206b/738133e4/39042d6c/7f91399e/2607838748/VEsE/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/endorse?sc=ema_2015-07-13_b1_tm") 50 elected officials have endorsed Patrick for Senate. That's because they know he's the Democrat who can win, and the candidate who will best serve the people of Florida in the Senate. All that's missing is you. Will you join us and endorse Patrick today? [**Say you're in. Endorse Patrick Murphy for U.S. Senate today.**](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae206b/738133e4/39042d6c/7f91399e/2607838748/VEsF/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/endorse?sc=ema_2015-07-13_b1_tm") Thank you for endorsing Patrick. We're glad to have you on the team! -Team Murphy | **[ENDORSE »](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae206b/738133e4/39042d6c/7f91399e/2607838748/VEsC/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/endorse?sc=ema_2015-07-13_b1_tm")**
---

name: Official Clinton Campaign
subject: What everyone will be talking about today:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
The future of our economy: _Emails like these are how we share important news with Hillary 's supporters. You may have some friends who are missing out on critical updates. Forward this email to three people and make sure they get on the official campaign list: **[**https://www.hillaryclinton.com/join/**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjMwMzc4MjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxMjY1OTQzS0&mt=1&rt=0)**_ | **_[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjMwMzc4MjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxMjY1OTQzS0&mt=1&rt=0)_**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjMwMzc4MjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxMjY1OTQzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjMwMzc4MjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxMjY1OTQzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjMwMzc4MjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxMjY1OTQzS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjMwMzc4MjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxMjY1OTQzS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjMwMzc4MjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxMjY1OTQzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
